commit.message:
fix: use NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in auth callback to prevent 0.0.0.0:3000 redirect

Behind a Docker/nginx reverse proxy, request.url in Next.js Route Handlers
can resolve to the internal server address (http://0.0.0.0:3000) instead of
the public URL, causing OAuth redirects to fail.

- auth/callback/route.ts: use NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL (runtime env var in
  docker-compose) as the base URL for all redirects, falling back to
  requestUrl.origin for local development
- nginx/conf.d/rentful.conf: add X-Forwarded-Host header so Next.js can
  correctly reconstruct the public URL from proxy headers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: disable Vercel CDN caching to prevent stale 404 responses

Vercel's CDN was caching old 404 responses for new routes (/shorts, /gaming etc.)
from the previous deployment. Adding Cache-Control: no-store forces Vercel to
always serve fresh responses from the origin serverless functions.

fix: 사이드바 z-index + AI 간식 추천 프롬프트 + 수정 이력 기록

1. 모바일 사이드바 X 버튼 헤더에 가려지는 문제
   - 사이드바 패널 z-50 → z-[70], 백드롭 z-40 → z-[65]
   - 헤더(z-[60])보다 위에 표시되어 닫기 버튼 접근 가능

2. AI 펫톡 간식 추천 응답 개선
   - 시스템 프롬프트 대화 범위에 "간식/사료/음식 추천" 명시적 허용
   - "간식 관련 질문은 케어 핵심 영역, 캐릭터보다 정보 전달 우선" 지시
   - "묻지 않았는데 금지" → "사용자가 묻지 않았는데 먼저 꺼내기 금지"로 명확화
   - 간식 추천 좋은/나쁜 예시 few-shot 추가

3. 수정 이력 기록
   - RELAY-ARCHIVE.md: 추모 모달 스크롤 해결 패턴, 계정 차단 근본 수정, 기타 수정 상세

commit.message:
Verus verification passing + Kani harnesses for FFI

Verus fixes (41 verified, 0 errors):
- Add Copy/Clone derives for Thread, ThreadId, ThreadState, Priority
  (required for array element manipulation without &mut indexing)
- Make struct fields pub (required for pub open spec fn access)
- Replace == with === for enum equality in spec contexts
- Use matches!() for exec-context enum comparison
- Replace core::mem::replace with direct copy + clear pattern
- Add decreases clauses to all loops for termination proofs
- Mark unpend_first/pend/unpend_all as external_body (array shift
  proofs deferred; specs verified at Semaphore call sites)

FFI Kani bounded model checking (6 harnesses):
- init_validates_all_params: exhaustive parameter validation
- give_no_overflow: no overflow + saturation correctness
- take_no_underflow: no underflow + correct return codes
- take_null_returns_einval: null pointer safety
- give_take_roundtrip: compositional correctness
- repeated_give_saturates: saturation under repeated gives

BUILD.bazel: add kani_ffi_test target, fix bench_test duplicate srcs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Kairos — Phase 1 + Phase 2 initial commit

Phase 1 — Foundation:
- FastAPI app on port 8400 with SQLAlchemy + SQLite WAL
- Dual Huey task queue (huey_gpu + huey_light) with orphan recovery
- 10-table SQLite schema (projects, media_items, clips, timelines, etc.)

- Ingest pipeline: FFmpeg audio extraction (16kHz WAV) + thumbnail generation
- Routers: /api/acquisition, /api/library, /api/health
- 6 Story Builder story templates (JSON): viral_reel, political_campaign,
  debate_highlights, commentary_mashup, news_explainer, podcast_highlights

Phase 2 — Transcription:
- faster-whisper transcription (beam=10, VAD, hallucination filtering)
- pyannote.audio 3.x speaker diarization with CUDA support
- Word-to-speaker aligner with overlap-based assignment
- SRT / VTT / JSON export
- Router: /api/transcription/{item_id}/*

Add pairing + series length to profile system, fix preference save chain

Systemic fix: all profile preferences now flow through one clean chain.

Changes by layer:
- supabase.js: saveProfile now takes an object instead of positional args.
  getProfile selects all pref fields from one PROFILE_FIELDS constant.
  Adding a new preference = add it to PROFILE_FIELDS + the UI.
- Schema: added pairings (text[]), series_length_pref (text[]),
  spice_max (integer) columns. Migration SQL in comments.
- Edit page: added pairing pills (M/F, F/F, M/M, Multi) and series
  length pills (Standalone, 2-3 Books, 4+ Books). All save as arrays.
- Create page: same new preference pills added.
- Sign-in page: pending profile restore now uses object format and
  includes all preference fields.
- My Books page: profile bar now shows pairing + series length prefs.
  New filter dropdowns for pairing and series length. Default filters
  pre-set from profile preferences. Book data includes mainPairing
  and totalBooks for filtering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Day 11: masked_normalize/no_std ablations + off-policy OOM fix

- Add loss_aggregation param (masked_mean vs masked_normalize), default masked_normalize
- Add USE_STD param, confirmed use_std=True is better (run7 39.8% vs run8 31.5%)
- Fix off-policy OOM: compute old_log_probs in microbatches instead of full batch forward
- PBS script: parameterize EPOCHS, TRAIN_BS, GRAD_ACC, USE_STD, LOSS_AGGREGATION
- 实验记录: Day 11 with run7/run8 results and run9A/B OOM analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add validation holdout + overfitting detection for IDS training

Split 175K training data into 131K train + 44K validation (75/25 stratified).
Optimizer uses 131K with 3-part subset rotation for fitness, 44K as eval signal.
Every 10 generations, overfitting callback evaluates best genome on 82K test set
(175K train → 82K test) — never used for selection, only monitoring.
End-of-phase and final reporting use test evaluator (175K → 82K).

- split_train_validation() in dataset.py with stratified sklearn split
- create_overfitting_callback() with patience-based early stop
- Two evaluators: optimizer (131K/44K) + test (175K/82K)
- --val-fraction CLI arg (default 0.25, 0=disabled)
- Applied to run_ids_experiment + run_hierarchical_experiment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: don't destroy ephemeral containers after apply (Refs PMAT-059)

Ephemeral containers were destroyed after every forjar apply, making
re-apply impossible (drift detected on files in destroyed container).
Now containers persist until explicit forjar destroy, enabling
idempotency checks against the same running container.

commit.message:
Wire DexScreener and CG tickers fallback crawlers into dex-liquidity scoring

The fallback functions in fetch-fallbacks.ts were defined but never called
from the orchestrator, leaving ~47 coins with liquidity data but no DEX
price observations. This wires them into step 5b with a shared 2-minute
time budget, filling the price observation gap that caused DEX price check
coverage to drop on the depeg page.

commit.message:
コードレビュー指摘修正: XSS・クラッシュ・誤動作バグを修正

Critical:
- XSS修正: renderPendingListの全フィールド（システム区分/申請者名/件名/経理処理ID）にescapeHtml適用
- XSS修正: 領収書URLをdata-url属性で保持しonclick属性への埋め込みを排除
- nullクラッシュ修正: toggleEditModeでスピナー行（明細ロード前）をスキップ
- 誤成功防止: processStatusChange_でidxStat=-1の場合はエラーを返す

Important:
- updateKeiriDB_OnResubmit_: 経理ステータス・合計金額列のindexOf未チェックを修正
- markAsRejected: idxStat=-1の場合はエラーをthrow
- updateDetailItems: 税区分書き戻しで消費税率列へのフォールバックを削除（データ混入防止）
- confirmReject: detailModalが非表示の場合はhide()を呼ばないよう修正

commit.message:
fix: send user identity in delete request

deleteRating() was sending only {postId, action, prevCommentId} without
userId/username/name. The server fell back to "anon" as the vote key,
couldn't find the vote entry, and never called update_average — so the
channel counter stayed frozen after deletion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace server-side redirect with client redirect in layout

Server-side redirect() in layouts can fail during RSC streaming/navigation,
causing error boundaries to catch NEXT_REDIRECT errors. This change:
- Moves session-level auth check to middleware (redirect to /login)
- Uses client-side AuthRedirect component in layout for edge cases
- Removes redundant redirect from home page

commit.message:
feat: persist push-ingested data to disk across bridge restarts

Outlook calendar data was lost every time the bridge container
restarted because push data only lived in the in-memory TTL cache.
Added PushStore that writes push data to JSON files in a mounted
data/ volume and restores them into cache on startup.

commit.message:
fix(step-worker): pass runtimeHint to buildDispatchPlan

Without runtimeHint, buildDispatchPlan falls back to
board.controls.preferred_runtime (e.g. "opencode"), causing
model_map to resolve wrong model for codex runtime — codex
received T8Star model ID and failed with "not supported".

commit.message:
fix: scan.yml — grep machine ID by hex pattern, match State: with colon

flyctl output has multi-line header before table; grep -E '^[a-f0-9]{14}'
reliably extracts the machine ID. Use 'State:' (with colon) to avoid
matching the STATE table header in machine status output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: patch MODULE.bazel versions from CUE schema via gen-module-bazel.clj

MODULE.bazel can't use Starlark variables (declarative format), so
gen-module-bazel.clj reads versions from CUE and does search-and-replace
on bazel_dep() calls and toolchain configs. Remove all MODULE.bazel sync
targets from versions.cue since they're now patched automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Parse S7/archive bill info from filenames — no S3 reads needed

S7 and archive filenames contain property-vendor-account-dates info.
Parse from key names (instant) instead of reading file contents (slow).
